Metadata.title: Sushi Maydo - Japanese Restaurant in Barcelona
Metadata.description: Where Japanese tradition meets Mediterranean elegance. Japanese restaurant in L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Barcelona.

Hero.title: MAYDO
Hero.desc: Where Japanese tradition meets Mediterranean elegance. L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Barcelona.

About.title: The essence of Japan in Barcelona
About.desc: Inspired by traditional flavours, MAYDO offers a fresh and creative interpretation of Japanese cuisine. Every visit is a sensory journey where the precision of Japanese culinary art merges with the warmth of the Mediterranean.

Menu.title: A culinary experience
Menu.desc: Each dish is a work of art, prepared with the freshest ingredients and the finest technique
Menu.item1Desc: All-you-can-eat buffet with a premium selection of sushi, sashimi and hot dishes
Menu.item2Desc: Complete omakase experience with seasonal ingredients
Menu.item3Desc: Chef's daily selection with daily surprises

Quote.text: A well-prepared Japanese meal has delicate flavours that must be savoured in the mouth to be truly appreciated
Quote.author: — MAYDO

Carta.title: Menu
Carta.heroDesc: Discover our Japanese dining experience with all-you-can-eat sushi and hot kitchen buffet.
Carta.lunchDesc: All-you-can-eat buffet with our full selection of sushi and Japanese cuisine.
Carta.dinnerDesc: Premium experience in the evening, weekends and holidays.
Carta.dailyDesc: Complete meal: 1 drink + 5 dishes of your choice + 1 coffee.
Carta.taxNote: *VAT included · Drinks and desserts not included in the buffet
Carta.buffetNote: *Our desserts and ice creams are handcrafted by artisan makers. Ask about our drinks and dessert selection.

Sobre.title: Our story
Sobre.heroDesc: Discover the passion and philosophy behind every dish at MAYDO.
Sobre.storyP1: MAYDO was born from a dream: to create a space where the precision and elegance of Japanese cuisine could merge with the warmth of the Mediterranean. Since our beginnings in L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, we have dedicated every day to perfecting this art.
Sobre.storyP2: Our team of chefs, trained in Japanese tradition, selects each ingredient with the same care an artisan chooses their tools. The result is a dining experience that honours Japanese roots while embracing the local culture.
Sobre.philoText: We believe every dish tells a story. Our mission is to bring authentic Japanese cuisine to Barcelona, respecting traditional techniques while innovating with the finest local and seasonal produce.
Sobre.teamDesc: A passionate team working every day to deliver the finest Japanese dining experience.
